# Pro Link Systems

> Managed IT services, cybersecurity, and cloud solutions for Los Angeles businesses since 1999. Based in Woodland Hills, CA and trusted by 500+ California organizations across healthcare, legal, finance, manufacturing, aerospace, and more.

Pro Link Systems is a managed IT services provider (MSP) serving the greater Los Angeles area. Founded in 1999 by Brian Shad and headquartered in Woodland Hills, the company delivers flat-rate managed IT, cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, backup and disaster recovery, AI automation, and a 24/7 help desk staffed by real engineers - with no long-term contracts.

- Address: 21241 Ventura Boulevard, Woodland Hills, CA 91364
- Phone: 1-800-890-6133
- Email: info@prolinksystems.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM PST (24/7 help desk for managed clients)
- Founded: 1999 (family-owned, 25+ years in business)
- Service area: Greater Los Angeles - San Fernando Valley, West LA, South Bay, and Orange County

## Services

- [Managed IT Services](https://prolinksystems.com/managed-it-services): Flat-rate managed IT for LA businesses - proactive monitoring, 24/7 help desk, no long-term contracts.
- [Cybersecurity Services](https://prolinksystems.com/cybersecurity-services): EDR, email security, 24/7 SOC monitoring, and ransomware and phishing defense.
- [Cloud Services](https://prolinksystems.com/cloud-services): Microsoft 365, Azure, cloud migration, virtual desktops, and managed cloud infrastructure.
- [Backup & Disaster Recovery](https://prolinksystems.com/backup-disaster-recovery): Automated backups, ransomware recovery, tested failover, and business continuity planning.
- [24/7 IT Help Desk](https://prolinksystems.com/it-help-desk): Round-the-clock support answered by real engineers, with under-15-minute average response.
- [AI & Automation Services](https://prolinksystems.com/ai-automation-services): AI knowledge assistants, workflow automation, Microsoft Copilot deployment, and custom AI solutions.
- [Outsourced IT Services](https://prolinksystems.com/outsourced-it-services-los-angeles): Replace an in-house IT department with a flat-rate team of local engineers, ideal for businesses with 5 to 100 employees.
- [Microsoft 365 Support](https://prolinksystems.com/microsoft-365-support-los-angeles): Microsoft 365 setup, migration, and management - Exchange, Teams, SharePoint, Azure AD, security hardening, and licensing optimization.
- [Network Support & Management](https://prolinksystems.com/network-support-los-angeles): 24/7 network monitoring, business WiFi design, firewall, VPN, and network security across the LA metro.
- [All Services Overview](https://prolinksystems.com/services): Full summary of Pro Link Systems' IT service offerings.

## Cybersecurity

- [Email Security](https://prolinksystems.com/email-security-services): Advanced email threat protection beyond standard spam filtering.
- [Endpoint Security](https://prolinksystems.com/endpoint-security-services): EDR/MDR and managed protection for laptops, desktops, and servers.
- [Network Security](https://prolinksystems.com/network-security-services): Firewalls, segmentation, and managed network defense.
- [Identity & Access Management](https://prolinksystems.com/identity-access-management): MFA, single sign-on, and least-privilege access control.
- [Security Awareness Training](https://prolinksystems.com/security-awareness-training): Phishing simulation and employee security training.
- [Governance, Risk & Compliance](https://prolinksystems.com/governance-risk-compliance): HIPAA, CMMC, SOC 2, PCI, and FTC Safeguards compliance support.

## Industries Served

- [Healthcare IT](https://prolinksystems.com/healthcare-it-services): HIPAA-compliant IT for clinics, medical practices, and healthcare organizations.
- [Law Firm IT](https://prolinksystems.com/law-firm-it-services-los-angeles): Secure document management and compliance-ready IT for law firms.
- [Financial Services IT](https://prolinksystems.com/financial-services-it): SEC/FINRA and GLBA-aligned IT for advisors, wealth managers, and finance firms.
- [Manufacturing IT](https://prolinksystems.com/manufacturing-it-services): CMMC-ready, OT/IT-integrated IT for manufacturers and defense contractors.
- [Aerospace & Defense IT](https://prolinksystems.com/aerospace-defense-it-services): CMMC and ITAR/CUI infrastructure for defense contractors.
- [Real Estate IT](https://prolinksystems.com/real-estate-it-services): Wire-fraud defense and IT for brokerages and property management.
- [Professional Services IT](https://prolinksystems.com/professional-services-it): Scalable IT for consulting, accounting, and professional firms.
- [Nonprofit IT](https://prolinksystems.com/nonprofit-it-services): Discounted, grant-compliant IT for nonprofits and foundations.
- [Technology & SaaS IT](https://prolinksystems.com/technology-it-services): SOC 2-ready cloud, identity, and endpoint management for tech companies.
- [Entertainment & Media IT](https://prolinksystems.com/entertainment-it-services): Content security (TPN) and post/VFX workstation support for media companies.
- [Education IT](https://prolinksystems.com/education-it-services): CIPA filtering, FERPA student-data security, and E-Rate support for schools.
- [Logistics IT](https://prolinksystems.com/logistics-it-services): WMS/TMS, warehouse Wi-Fi, and EDI support for logistics and warehousing.
- [Waste Management IT](https://prolinksystems.com/waste-management-it-services): Fleet, scale-house, and critical-infrastructure IT for waste companies.
